title: Summary: Turn 903
content: P1 implemented: `ObsidianExportService` (interface, impl, tests) exports KnowledgeBase notions to Obsidian vault with YAML front matter, bidirectional wiki-links, dedup, filename sanitization, category/subcategory `_index.md`, and Java 1.8 compatibility. 9 test cases cover edge cases (empty, null path, subcategories, relations). Ready for P2 CLI integration.
